# Regenerative Therapy

At Capstone Veterinary Care, we are dedicated to providing the most innovative care possible for your beloved pets. As part of our commitment to advanced veterinary medicine, we proudly offer pet regenerative medicine services for pets.

## What is Regenerative Therapy?

Regenerative therapy in veterinary medicine involves the therapeutic use of your pet’s own tissue to promote healing and reduce inflammation. These treatments can be particularly beneficial for pets suffering from arthritis, tendon and ligament injuries, and other degenerative conditions. The goal is to **enhance the body’s natural ability to heal itself**, improving your pet’s quality of life and mobility.

### Stem Cell Therapy

This minimally invasive procedure involves extracting a small amount of fat, processing it to isolate the stem cells, and injecting these potent cells into the affected area. Stem cells are unique because they have the potential to develop into different types of cells and tissues. Stem cells are harvested from your pet’s own fat tissue, and collection of this tissue can even be done at the same time as a [routine surgery](https://capstonevetcare.com/service/soft-tissue-surgery/) and then banked for future use. Once injected, stem cells reduce inflammation, promote tissue regeneration, and accelerate the healing process. Stem cell therapy can be particularly effective for conditions such as osteoarthritis, hip dysplasia, and ligament injuries.

# Regenerative Medicine for Pets

Pets are part of the family, and their health is as important as the rest of the families. If they are struggling with a condition and you are looking to seek advanced treatment or therapy, seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies and Rehabilitation.

Our veterinary experts are well-versed in the latest [regenerative medicine](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine) techniques and are dedicated to providing every client with the best care and treatments, including regenerative medicines for pets where possible.

Start giving your pet a better chance at improved quality of life; seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies & Rehabilitation today.

## **What is Regenerative Medicine for Pets?**

[Regenerative medicine for pets](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine) is an innovative, groundbreaking field of veterinary medicine that harnesses the body’s natural healing processes to repair and regenerate damaged organs or tissues. ![laser therapy](/images/content/23-images/laser-therapy.png)

![laser therapy](/images/content/23-images/laser-therapy.png)

Within this field are advanced therapies such as [stem cell therapy](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/stem-cell-therapy), [platelet rich plasma therapy](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/platelet-rich-plasma) and other biologic treatments that promote healing, reduce inflammation and improve function for pets.

### [**Stem Cell Therapy**](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/stem-cell-therapy)

[Stem cell therapy](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/stem-cell-therapy) uses the body’s stem cells which have a unique ability to develop various types of cells that are needed for repair and regeneration. Typically, these cells are harvested from your pet’s fat tissue or bone marrow. It is then processed and injected into the affected area to promote healing and tissue regeneration.

### [**Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) Therapy**](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/platelet-rich-plasma)

[Platelet Rich Plasma Therapy](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine/platelet-rich-plasma), or PRP Therapy uses a concentrated form of your pet’s blood to promote healing within affected areas. The blood, once taken, is processed to best extract the platelet rich plasma, which is rich in growth factors, and injected into the affected area to promote healing and tissue regeneration.

Although both forms of treatment can be given individually, they can also work effectively when combined, significantly reducing the need for repeated treatment and injections.

If you feel your pet would benefit from either form of regenerative medicine for pets, seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies & Rehabilitation from your local veterinary practice.

## **What Regenerative Medicine Offers for Pets**

There are a number of advantages that [regenerative medicines](/veterinary-professionals/our-services/regenerative-medicine) offer for pets, including:

If you feel your pet can benefit from what regenerative medicines offer, seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies & Rehabilitation today from your local veterinary practice.

### **Additional Benefits of Regenerative Medicines for Pets**

As a pet owner, you want to ensure that your pet makes the most of their lives and can enjoy them fully. Regenerative medicine can greatly enhance the quality of your pet’s life, helping them to live a![hydrotherapy 400x469](/images/content/23-images/hydrotherapy-400x469.png) life pain-free and more active without the limitations of chronic pain or injury.

![hydrotherapy 400x469](/images/content/23-images/hydrotherapy-400x469.png)

With the effects of this form of therapy also being long-lasting, it can lead to a more substantial improvement in your pet’s health and function. Regenerative medicine for pets is aimed at promoting the repair and regeneration of tissues as opposed to masking the symptoms caused by the problem.

Both stem cell therapy and PRP therapy use natural substances derived from your pet’s own body in order to promote healing. This reduces the risks of adverse reactions or complications, making it a safe and natural form of medicine for pets.

They are also both incredibly versatile forms of therapy that can be used to treat a wide range of conditions, from joint and ligament injuries to chronic inflammatory diseases or post-surgical recovery.

With all of these additional benefits for pets, regenerative medicine is an invaluable form of therapy in veterinary medicine, ensuring that your pets get the absolute best in their recovery. If you feel your pet may reap the benefits of regenerative medicine for pets, seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies & Rehabilitation today from your local vets.

### **Why Greenside for Regenerative Medicines?**

At Greenside Vets, we have an [experienced veterinary team](/about-us/meet-the-team) that offer extensive knowledge and expertise in regenerative medicine for pets. We aim to remain at the forefront of all veterinary medicine advancements in order to ensure that every pet we see gets the highest standards of care and treatment available.

To help guide and deliver these advanced therapies, we have state-of-the-art facilities and equipment that help our team in providing accurate and reliable results for a wide range of conditions. Our team is also able to offer a holistic approach to your pet’s care, offering tailored support for your pet, depending on their unique condition and health.

We understand your pet is a part of your family; this is why our team offers the best care to every pet that we see in practice. If you feel they could benefit from regenerative medicine for pets, seek a referral to Greenside Regenerative Therapies & Rehabilitating today and get your beloved pet back to full health quickly.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Regenerative medicine utilizes advanced techniques like stem cell therapy and platelet-rich plasma to harness the body's natural healing processes, offering new hope for chronic conditions.
These therapies effectively target chronic issues such as arthritis and tendon injuries, promoting tissue regeneration and significantly improving mobility and quality of life for pets.
Regenerative therapies accelerate healing by reducing inflammation and promoting cellular repair, enabling quicker recovery from injuries and surgeries, thereby shortening rehabilitation times.
By alleviating pain and improving mobility, regenerative therapies enhance overall well-being, allowing pets to engage in more activities and enjoy a better quality of life.

As research advances, regenerative medicine is poised to revolutionize veterinary care, providing more effective treatments and encouraging a shift towards holistic, preventive approaches in animal health.
